summary: Testing completed for DioAI Resume & LinkedIn Optimizer (iteration 10). Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working. Fixed a bug in /api/resume/pricing endpoint (KeyError for product_description).
passed_tests: GET /api/resume/pricing returns product name, price, features, currency
POST /api/resume/upload accepts PDF, returns resume_id and text preview
POST /api/resume/analyze returns structured analysis with overall_score, ats_score, strengths, weaknesses, missing_keywords, suggestions
GET /api/resume/payment-status/{resume_id} returns paid:false for unpaid resume
GET /api/admin/resume/pricing returns full pricing config (auth required)
/resume-optimizer page loads with step progress (Upload → Analysis → Unlock Pro → Optimize)
Upload card shows 'Choose File' button accepting PDF/DOCX
'Resume AI' link visible and working in navbar
Admin sidebar has 'Resume Tool' link with FileSearch icon
/admin/resume page loads with pricing form and analytics cards (Total Analyses, Paid Users, Total Revenue)
Dio chatbot does NOT auto-open on mobile viewport (width < 768px)

bugs_fixed.issue: GET /api/resume/pricing returned 500 error due to KeyError 'product_description'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed pricing['product_description'] to pricing.get('product_description', 'default value') to handle missing keys in DB-stored pricing

seed_data_creation: Created test PDF files for resume upload testing using PyMuPDF
context_for_next_testing_agent: Resume Optimizer feature is fully working. Key points: 1) Resume analysis uses Gemini 2.0 Flash via emergentintegrations LlmChat. 2) Results are cached in MongoDB (resume_analyses collection). 3) Paid features (improve, linkedin) return 402 until payment is verified. 4) Admin resume page at /admin/resume has pricing form + analytics. 5) DioChat component at line 107 checks window.innerWidth < 768 to skip auto-open on mobile. 6) The pricing endpoint uses .get() with defaults to handle missing fields in DB-stored pricing.

features_verified.resume_pricing_api: Working - returns product_name, price, features, currency with discount support
features_verified.resume_upload_api: Working - accepts PDF/DOCX, extracts text, returns resume_id
features_verified.resume_analysis_api: Working - AI analysis via Gemini returns scores and feedback
features_verified.payment_status_api: Working - returns paid:false for unpaid resumes
features_verified.admin_resume_tool_link: Working - visible in sidebar with FileSearch icon

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/analyze: 200 OK - {overall_score, ats_score, strengths, weaknesses, missing_keywords, suggestions}
